Workout Logging — R1

The hero screen and the reference implementation of the card language. Three moments in one session: logging as prescribed, the RPE suggestion, and a superset. Designed-in fixes for #66 (≥44pt taps, explicit + Add set, a per-row ⋯ overflow, and the no-collapse rule) and #67 (notes anchor above the keyboard). Judge: is the working weight instantly the biggest thing, does accent appear only on now and moss only on earned, and does one tap still log a set.

9:41100%

⌂Home
◉Workout
↗Progress
➜Run
Superset · grouped by structure

Logging as prescribed is one tap — everything else is disclosure. Tapping a set row's ✓ logs it and advances the now; the per-row ⋯ (≥44pt) is the only path to edit or remove a set, and a set-row tap never collapses the card. Sets you add live behind an explicit + Add set row; notes live collapsed behind + Add note and their input anchors above the keyboard when opened (#67). RPE is optional and appears only after the last set is logged. Accent marks only now — the current set, the armed Finish, the active tab; moss marks only what is earned. The working weight is always the biggest number on the screen.
